theorem P2_imp_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 A → P3 A := by
  intro hP2
  have h_cl : closure (interior A) ⊆ closure A :=
    Set.closure_mono (Set.interior_subset)
  have h_int : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ interior (closure A) :=
    Set.interior_mono h_cl
  have h : A ⊆ interior (closure A) := Set.Subset.trans hP2 h_int
  simpa [P3] using h

import Mathlib
import Aesop

open Set

theorem P2_imp_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro hP2
  intro x hxA
  have hx₁ : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := hP2 hxA
  have hsubset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A) :=
    interior_subset
  exact hsubset hx₁

theorem Topology.P2_imp_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X}
    (hA : Topology.P2 A) : Topology.P1 A :=
by
  unfold Topology.P1 Topology.P2 at hA ⊢
  exact subset_trans hA interior_subset

theorem Topology.P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P2, Topology.P1] at *
  intro x hx
  exact interior_subset (hP2 hx)
